mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_feedback t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.id},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.content},'%')
AND t.img like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.img},'%')
AND t.type_id = #{feedbackEntity.typeId}
AND t.member_id = #{feedbackEntity.memberId}
AND t.contact_way like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.contactWay},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.updateUser},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_feedback t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.id},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.content},'%')
AND t.img like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.img},'%')
AND t.type_id = #{feedbackEntity.typeId}
AND t.member_id = #{feedbackEntity.memberId}
AND t.contact_way like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.contactWay},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{feedbackEntity.updateUser},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_feedback t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
